gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 found one matrix release-safe CLI flag issue; after patch and regression tests, re-review reported no findings.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_databricks_engine_probe_job.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py (38 passed)
what_changed: Added a release-safe Databricks engine-probe matrix submit payload for paired native vLLM and SGLang block-manager probes.
Rejected ambiguous single-target debug CLI flags when --backend-config-json is used.
why: V1 release evidence needs an operator-safe way to run connector action descriptor validation against both native engine block managers without proprietary serving infrastructure.
